overall.description: A first-person walk through a dark, futuristic sci-fi facility corridor with neon lighting. The camera moves steadily past glass observation walls revealing containment areas with red lighting, then proceeds down a narrower corridor toward a large security door.

scene_state.functional_zone: sci-fi corridor with glass observation walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the corridor, passing by glass observation walls revealing containment areas with red lighting

entered.detail: transparent glass wall revealing interior containment chamber with pink emergency lighting
interior room visible through glass with red emergency lighting and industrial equipment
horizontal red neon light strips mounted on walls and ceiling
continuous cyan-white LED strips running along both sides of the floor
large metal double door at the end of the corridor with vertical light strips

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a dark, neon-lit sci-fi corridor. Glass observation walls on the left reveal containment areas with red emergency lighting inside. The floor features glowing cyan light strips along the edges, and a large security door is visible in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow access corridor approaching secure door

events.description: transitions from glass-walled observation corridor to solid-walled narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the narrower corridor, approaching the large security door at the end

entered.detail: dark ridged metal wall panels replacing the previous glass walls
small vertical red indicator lights mounted on the walls
structural columns flanking the security door with mounted security devices
surveillance cameras mounted above the door frame

segments.scene_description: The corridor transitions to solid metal walls with small red status lights. The camera continues walking toward the security door, which grows progressively larger in the frame. Security cameras and structural columns become visible around the door frame as the camera approaches the end of the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dark, futuristic corridor that transitions from an observation gallery into a reinforced security zone. It begins by gliding past glass walls that reveal containment areas bathed in red emergency lighting, while glowing cyan strips guide the path along the floor toward a distant security door. As the camera advances, the transparent walls give way to solid metal surfaces punctuated by small red status lights. The scene then narrows as the security door grows progressively larger in the frame, revealing structural columns and security cameras mounted around the frame before the camera reaches the end of the corridor.
